title: Global Warming Could Ravage the Amazon’s Useful Plant Species, Study Finds
summary_full: Hotter temperatures and harsher droughts could cause Indigenous societies to lose many of the species they have used for medicine, rituals and more, scientists found.
summary_public: Hotter temperatures and harsher droughts could cause Indigenous societies to lose many of the species they have used for medicine, rituals and more, scientists found.
